info.name: VetCentre
info.description:
# VetCentre API

This collection contains the API requests for the **VetCentre HR Training** system, built on Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central.

All requests are routed through the `ClientHandler_RequestJson` endpoint and use a `jsonRequest` payload to specify the operation. Authentication is handled via **OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials** using a Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) tenant.

## Base URL
`{{API_BASE_URL}}`

## Authentication
All requests use OAuth 2.0 with client credentials grant type. The access token is automatically fetched from:
```
https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenantId}/oauth2/v2.0/token
```
The token is added to the `Authorization` header as a Bearer token.

## Variables
| Variable | Description |
|---|---|
| `API_BASE_URL` | The base URL for the Business Central OData endpoint |
| `POSTMAN_API_KEY` | Your Postman API key, used by the auto-documentation script |

item.name: auth

exec: return console.log("POSTMAN_API_KEY is not set in the environment. Please add it to continue.");
if (err) return console.log("Error fetching collection:", err);

request.description:
## Login

Authenticates a user against the VetCentre HR Training system.

### Endpoint
`POST {{API_BASE_URL}}/ClientHandler_RequestJson?company=Vet%20Centre%20HR%20Training`

### Request Body
The body is a JSON object with a single `jsonRequest` field containing a stringified JSON payload:

```json
{
    "jsonRequest": "{\"flag\": \"login\", \"userNameOrEmail\": \"user@example.com\", \"password\": \"yourpassword\"}"
}
```

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `flag` | string | Operation identifier. Must be `"login"` for this request |
| `userNameOrEmail` | string | The user's email address or username |
| `password` | string | The user's password |

### Responses

#### 200 OK — Login successful
```json
{
    "@odata.context": "https://api.businesscentral.dynamics.com/v2.0/ea1cb602-3500-4200-9f29-6524e1209b50/VET/ODataV4/$metadata#Edm.String",
    "value": "{\"success\":true,\"data\":{\"token\":\"<session_token>\",\"userId\":\"<user_id>\"}}"
}
```

#### 200 OK — Login failed (account blocked)
```json
{
    "@odata.context": "https://api.businesscentral.dynamics.com/v2.0/ea1cb602-3500-4200-9f29-6524e1209b50/VET/ODataV4/$metadata#Edm.String",
    "value": "{\"success\":false,\"data\":{\"message\":\"Your account has been blocked. Contact administrator\"}}"
}
```

> **Note:** This API always returns HTTP 200. The response body is a Business Central OData envelope. The actual result is inside the `value` field as a stringified JSON string — parse it to check the `success` field.

### Auto-documentation
This request includes a post-response test script that automatically saves the latest response as a saved example in the collection, keeping the documentation up to date after every run.

item.description:
## Auth

Contains authentication-related requests for the VetCentre HR Training system.

These requests handle user identity verification against the Business Central backend. The `flag` field in the `jsonRequest` payload determines the operation type.
